mapper.select: SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM transfer_order ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE source_branch_id = #{sourceBranchId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE target_branch_id = #{targetBranchId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM transfer_order WHERE source_branch_id = #{branchId} OR target_branch_id = #{branchId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE transfer_order SET status = #{status}, version = version + 1, operator_id = #{operatorId}, operator_name = #{operatorName}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, shipped_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'IN_TRANSIT' THEN NOW() ELSE shipped_at END, received_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'COMPLETED' THEN NOW() ELSE received_at END, cancelled_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'CANCELLED' THEN NOW() ELSE cancelled_at END WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
